title: cistus fasciculatus
intro: Cistus fasciculatus, also known as Rock Rose or White Rockrose, is a perennial shrub native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which contribute to its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for soothing wounds and reducing fever. Cistus fasciculatus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
